title: Add the ability to change the type of leading column
excerpt: I’d love to be able to change the type of column the leading column is, as it stands now these are only known as “items” or if you change the terminology but you cannot change the type of column. This would be extremely …

posts.author: kaiden132 (Kaila)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love to be able to change the type of column the leading column is, as it stands now these are only known as “items” or if you change the terminology but you cannot change the type of column. This would be extremely helpful!

posts.author: ajay_parikh (Ajay Parikh)
posts.cookedHtml: Or be able to switch the leading column with one of the other columns in your board.
